subcodes.first_line: All praise be to Thee, O my God, inasmuch as Thou hast adorned the world with the splendour of the dawn
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما زینت العالم بانوار فجر لیل فیه ولد من بشر بمطلع
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
